args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%' AND LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%' AND LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%';

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
